text:
{
  "type": "VIDEO",
  "videoUrl": "https://www.youtube.com/embed/ABCDE12345",
  "videoTitle": "Proper Hand Positioning and Posture Techniques",
  "content": "Learn the essential techniques for proper hand positioning and posture while playing the piano.",
  "bullets": [
    "Sit up straight with feet flat on the floor.",
    "Keep wrists relaxed and slightly elevated.",
    "Curve fingers naturally over the keys.",
    "Maintain a comfortable distance from the piano.",
    "Avoid tension in shoulders and arms."
  ]
}
